base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_2_moon_first_quest — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Level 2 'Moon' (Crescent) — Dodongo boss, Boomerang-item. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
